title: Published Languages Expose Boundary Contracts

checks.description: published-language and OpenAPI patterns are valid and production-covered
checks.command: rta check --pattern-specs --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --pattern-contracts --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --production --root fixtures/golden/pass

decision: OpenAPI, AsyncAPI, CloudEvents, MCP, and CLI contracts are published languages built from declared boundary schemas and ports; they must not expose aggregate internals as the public contract.
